class.name: Axis
class.description: [Axis] wraps an OCCT [code]gp_Ax1[/code] and represents an origin plus direction. It is intended as a reusable orientation helper for rotations and placement operations.

method.name: set_axis
method.description: Sets the axis origin and direction.

method.name: reversed
method.description: Returns a copy of the axis with reversed direction.

method.name: transformed
method.description: Returns the axis transformed by [param location].
